productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Printed Blue Tshirts
description: Composition Dark blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, distressed look print on the front and brand tab attached to the left hem on the front Fitting Regular   Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little one ready for action with this dark blue T-shirt from palm tree. The distressed look graphic on the front of the Hockey champions challenge poster gives this an active vibe. Team this with jeans, tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
